commands.review_summary:
The branch generates SecretRef credential-surface Markdown from the credential matrix, adds writer/check package scripts wired into preflight, updates the generated reference doc, and adds formatter, drift, and package-script tests.

PR surface: Source +124, Tests +213, Docs 0, Config +2, Other +60. Total +399 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection is enough to reproduce the current gap: current main's generator writes only the JSON matrix and current main has no SecretRef docs check/write package scripts. I did not run mutating generator commands in the read-only checkout.
